ainera.description: Focused on the end-to-end development and optimization of web applications tailored to specific client business requirements.
highlights: Developed and maintained multiple client websites using WordPress, PHP, and .NET
Customized website functionality, themes, and plugins to meet diverse client requirements
Implemented backend logic and database interactions using SQLite

timitis.description: Contributed to the full-cycle development of an IT service order management platform, bridging the gap between client requests and service delivery.
highlights: Developed a full-stack IT service order management system using React (TypeScript) and Spring Boot
Designed and exposed RESTful APIs supporting full CRUD functionality
Modeled and optimized relational databases with Spring Data JPA / Hibernate
Secured application endpoints with Spring Security (JWT/session-based if applicable)
Implemented email notifications using Spring Mail
Reduced boilerplate and improved code readability with Lombok
Worked in an Agile (Scrum) team, managing code with Git

lutra-ledger.description: A high-performance desktop utility developed for UAB Lutra to automate the generation of structured PDF service documents.
content: # Overview
Lutra Ledger streamlines administrative workflows by transforming complex service data and client information into standardized, print-ready PDF reports.
## Key Features
- **Automated PDF Generation**: Converts user-selected service parameters into structured documents using a consistent, professional template.
- **Data Persistence**: Robust local storage of client and service records, ensuring full functionality without an internet connection.
- **Search & Auto-populate**: Intelligent filtering of services to accelerate document creation and minimize manual data entry errors.
## Technical Stack
- **Frontend Core**: Built with **Svelte** and **TypeScript** for a reactive, type-safe user interface.
- **Desktop Runtime**: Utilizes **Tauri** to bridge the web-based frontend with a powerful **Rust** backend.
- **Performance**: Leveraging Rust ensures a minimal binary size and native-level execution speeds with memory safety.
- **Database**: Powered by **SQLite** for lightweight, serverless, and reliable local data management.

rhythmic.description: A cross-platform music management tool to organize, version, and synchronize playlists between Spotify, YouTube, and SoundCloud.
content: # Overview
Rhythmic addresses the fragmentation of digital music by providing a single interface to control libraries across multiple streaming services.
## Core Capabilities
- **Cross-Platform Sync**: Transfer and synchronize playlists from one provider to another seamlessly.
- **Version Control**: Track changes to your playlists over time, allowing you to revert or manage different iterations.
- **Smart Organization**: Automatically detect duplicate tracks and split oversized playlists into manageable segments.
## Technical Architecture
- Built with a **React + TypeScript** frontend for a fast, responsive user experience.
- Powered by a **.NET 9** backend utilizing **ASP.NET Core Web API** and **Entity Framework Core**.
- Scalable **MySQL** database design to manage complex cross-platform track metadata and user sessions.
- Secure authentication integrated via **OAuth 2.0** for Google, Spotify, and SoundCloud.

blaze-website.description: A high-performance web platform for Blaze.lt, featuring real-time Minecraft server synchronization and automated payment processing.
content: # Overview
Blaze.lt is a sophisticated gaming community portal that bridges the gap between web services and live game server data.
## Core Integrations
- **Minecraft Live-Sync**: Real-time communication with the game server via HTTPS and shared MySQL databases to display live player statistics and server status.
- **E-commerce & Payments**: Full **Paysera** integration for automated service purchases and donation processing.
- **Real-time Data**: Leverages Svelte's reactivity to show up-to-the-minute information without requiring manual page refreshes.
## Technical Stack
- **Svelte Architecture**: Built entirely with **Svelte** for a seamless, ultra-fast single-page experience.
- **Type-Safe Data**: Utilizes **Drizzle ORM** for robust, type-safe interactions with the MySQL backend.
- **Modern Styling**: Powered by **Tailwind CSS**, focusing on a gaming-centric aesthetic that is fully responsive and accessible.

shorty.description: A lightweight URL shortening service built with Go and SQL.
content: # Overview
Shorty is a no-frills URL shortener that creates compact links for long URLs, making them easier to share.
## Features
- Create and resolve shortened URLs with low-latency **Go** HTTP handlers.
- Persistent storage backed by SQL with an indexed redirect table.
- Minimal dependency footprint — no frameworks, just the standard library.

timitis.description: An enterprise-grade Project Management System (PMS) featuring multi-tenant access control for internal employees and external clients.
content: # Overview
Developed during a professional internship, this system centralizes project lifecycles, task tracking, and client relationship management into a single secure platform.
## Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
- **Admin/Manager**: Full CRUD capabilities for users, companies, and project assignments.
- **Employee**: Dedicated dashboard for tracking assigned tasks, logging work hours, and collaborative commenting.
- **Client**: External portal for tracking project progress, submitting new tasks, and providing feedback.
## Technical Architecture
- **Spring Boot Backend**: Utilized **Spring Data JPA** and **MapStruct** to create a highly efficient, boilerplate-free data layer.
- **React Frontend**: Built a responsive, type-safe UI using **TypeScript** and **Axios** for seamless REST API communication.
- **Data Integrity**: Designed a complex relational schema to handle interconnected entities like Users, Companies, Projects, and Tasks.
- **System Settings**: Implemented a dynamic administrative module to configure SMTP, Database connections, and file upload parameters at runtime.

worsetagram.description: A functional Instagram-inspired Android application developed to explore Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and modern mobile architecture.
content: # Overview
Worsetagram serves as a comprehensive learning project, implementing the core social media experience from media uploads to real-time messaging.
## Core Features
- **Social Ecosystem**: Full game-loop of content creation, including image uploads, captions, and interactive feeds with likes and comments.
- **Direct Messaging**: Real-time communication layer allowing users to exchange private messages.
- **Discovery & Profile**: Search functionality for finding users and dedicated profile management for personalizing account details.
## Technical Architecture
- **Modern Android Stack**: Built with **Jetpack Compose** for a declarative UI and **Dagger-Hilt** for robust dependency injection.
- **Clean Architecture**: Organized into Data, Domain, and UI layers to maintain a scalable and testable codebase.
- **Firebase Integration**: Utilizes **Firebase Auth** for security, **Firestore** for real-time data syncing, and **Firebase Storage** for media assets.
- **Code Quality**: Enforced strict formatting standards using **ktfmt** (based on Google Java Format).

purrislav.description: A performance-focused Discord bot built in Rust that automates community engagement through birthday tracking and dynamic role management.
content: # Overview
Purrislav is a lightweight utility bot designed for long-term stability and low-footprint hosting on a VPS.
## Core Features
- **Birthday System**: Server members can register their birthdays; the bot performs a daily automated check to send reminders to a designated channel.
- **Color Roles**: Provides an intuitive interface for users to create and manage custom colored roles within the server.
- **Slash Commands**: Fully integrated with the modern Discord API for a seamless user experience.
## Technical Stack
- Developed using **Rust** and the **Poise** framework for high concurrency and type safety.
- Data persistence handled by **SQLite**, providing a self-contained and portable database solution.
- Utilizes **Diesel ORM** for robust database migrations and compile-time checked queries.

blackjack.description: A browser-based implementation of the classic casino card game, featuring Glassmorphism UI and optimized for smooth web play.
content: # Overview
A pure JavaScript game that simulates a high-stakes Blackjack experience directly in your browser without the need for external libraries.
## Game Mechanics
- **Scoring Logic**: Cards 2-10 hold face value, J/Q/K are worth 10, and Aces are dynamically valued at 11.
- **Objective**: Compete against a virtual dealer to reach a total as close to 21 as possible without 'busting'.
- **Dealer AI**: Includes an automated dealer behavior loop for a consistent single-player challenge.
## Highlights
- **Glassmorphism Design**: Minimalist, frosted-glass interface built with modern CSS properties.
- **Vanilla Implementation**: Developed using only **HTML5**, **CSS3**, and **ES6+ JavaScript**, ensuring fast load times and zero dependencies.

sortvisualizer.description: A desktop-based visualization tool built with WinForms to demonstrate the mechanics and efficiency of various sorting algorithms.
content: # Overview
SortVisualizer provides a graphical representation of how data moves during sorting, helping to understand the time complexity and logic behind different algorithms.
## Supported Algorithms
- **Divide & Conquer**: Merge Sort, Quick Sort, and Heap Sort.
- **Classic Sorts**: Bubble Sort, Selection Sort, and Insertion Sort.
- **Unique Sorts**: Gnome Sort and Pancake Sort.
## Key Features
- **Execution Timing**: Built-in timers to compare the real-world performance of each algorithm side-by-side.
- **Step-by-Step Rendering**: Watch the array transform in real-time as the algorithms swap and compare elements.
- **Native Performance**: Built entirely in **C#** using the **Windows Forms** (WinForms) framework for a lightweight desktop experience.
